title: More Than a Woman
why_this_song: More Than a Woman by Bee Gees (1977) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 17 times; first heard in: "More than a woman"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "Oh, girl I've known you very well"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "And if I lose you now, I think I would die"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "Oh, say you'll always be my baby, we can make it shine"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "Oh, say you'll always be my baby, we can make it shine"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "woman" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "woman" na música inteira?

More than a woman to me

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "More Than a Woman" was released in 1977. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "More Than a Woman" foi lançada em 1977. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
